telemetryEnabled.title: Enable usage telemetry
telemetryEnabled.description: When true (and an endpoint is set), OroQ posts safeguarding usage events to the school's own endpoint. Off by default. No third-party analytics.

telemetryEndpoint.title: Telemetry endpoint (HTTPS)
telemetryEndpoint.description: HTTPS URL that receives OroQ usage events as JSON. Leave blank to disable.

telemetryBearerToken.title: Telemetry bearer token
telemetryBearerToken.description: Optional. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on telemetry requests.
